title: Law Carries Corazon's Will
description: Pages 4–8 focus on law carries corazon's will, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Donquixote Family, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Corazon, Unknown person #5 as the flashback closes as Law's present battle against Doflamingo becomes a fight to honor Corazon's love and sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: that day to which he can never return."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why'd you steal even my powers!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: shall I grant it to you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's no going back any more!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We'll take your head to gain entrance back into the Holy Land!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: You had to have a father like me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I have no idea what is going on inside!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The town was suddenly engaged in a giant cage-like structure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It is impossible to enter it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Perhaps because of some type of falling out, the pirates have turned against each other!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: They're slaughtering each other in cold blood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Save me! Ain't there anything you can do about this cage!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Damn it, where'd that shitty brat run off to!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Even though he's stronger than any of us... he's got the intes- final fortitude of a kitten!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: When the cards are down, he's never fuckin' around!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: We're being invaded! It's the Donquijote Family!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Are you the scum that stole the ope ope no mi?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Well, at least I can end this one-sided massacre...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: These idiots sure are Rollin' in the dough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Hey, hey-, careful with the merchant- disc!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: When you idiots finally take your thumbs out your asses, go and look for Cora- Zon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: There ain't no way there's anyone left...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: So the Marines are protecting someone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: It looks like we've found co- razor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: They ain't gonna find you, so just sit tight!

summary: Law Carries Corazon's Will advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Donquixote Family, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
